rag_rules: Fix unresolved references in AGREE guarantees by ensuring all identifiers are visible or properly declared in the same annex.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts; use only visible features or outputs.
generic_rules: When validating AGREE contracts, ensure all referenced identifiers resolve to valid AADL features or declared helpers.
Place assumption/guarantee contracts in appropriate scopes: type scopes for component types, implementation scopes for implementations.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE guarantees should relate visible inputs to visible outputs without relying on internal subcomponent paths.
Boolean logic in AGREE should use valid expressions with properly typed identifiers.
anti_patterns: Do not add architecture elements to resolve AGREE type errors; instead, fix root causes or remove invalid clauses.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes unless represented through valid variables or outputs.
